paper_announcements.summary: A new scientific multimodal foundation model called Intern-S1-Pro at trillion scale is announced with a research paper.
Release announcement for SAM 3.1, an update to SAM 3 that introduces object multiplexing to improve video processing.
Paper announcement about self-distillation of hidden layers for self-supervised representation learning, introducing Bootleg method.
Release of OmniReset framework for training robot policies using large-scale RL and diverse resets for contact-rich manipulation.
Hermes Agent v0.5.0 is released with updates and improvements to the AI agent framework.
slime v0.2.4 framework release focusing on profiling and observability with rollout trace timeline viewer and real-time W&B reporting.
Research paper on alignment challenges in large language models, showing how finetuning activates verbatim recall of copyrighted books.
Release of agent data protocol dataset with 3M+ trajectories that unifies different agent traces in a single format.

discussions.summary: Discussion about whether Gaussian splats should be considered 'AI' technology and the problems with using 'AI' as a label for heterogeneous technologies.
Thread discussing intelligence as having an optimality bound rather than being an unbounded scalar stat like height, challenging the '10,000 IQ' AI concept.
Discussion about how humans with external cognitive tools sit close to the optimality bound for intelligence and should be able to solve any solvable problem.
Technical discussion about training methods and whether there are methods that only work past gigawatt-class hardware, questioning if scale is truly a moat.
Discussion about the challenges of interpretability research and how sparse decompositions don't solve the problem of making AI systems understandable to humans.
Comment on AI sycophancy research, suggesting it's a suitable metric for interpretability work since we haven't found better metrics to optimize.

announcements.summary: Teknium asks if people would be interested in a large data dump of agentic trajectories to train models to perform well in Hermes Agent.
Microsoft announces partnership with Crusoe on a 900MW AI factory in Abilene, Texas for AI infrastructure development.
Poll asking which operating system people run Hermes Agent on, gathering user feedback for the AI agent platform.
University of Washington astronomers discover rare evidence of two planets colliding 11,000 light-years away, aiding search for Earth-like worlds.
Various gaming product launches and pre-orders announced including Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5 Pro price increases, and new game releases.

other.summary: Retweet expressing strong negative reaction to an execution, with high engagement (38,166 RTs).
Retweet about Iranian embassy posting photos of commanders who ordered an attack on a school, relating to Middle East conflict.
Comment criticizing military destruction, calling it 'obliterated' rather than 'damaged' and noting the waste of public resources.
Announcement about the indie RPG 'OFF' getting an official Japanese translation release on Nintendo Switch and Steam.
Personal update about being in love and feeling happy every day, expressing positive emotions.
Motivational tweet from John Cena about not knowing your ultimate ceiling for achievement and not worrying about resource allocation.
Bernie Sanders criticizing Elon Musk's low effective tax rate compared to average workers and calling for wealthy to pay fair share.
Personal travel update about flying home for family emergency and missing Bernie rally, plus observations about airport security.
